body: Phase 2 substrate online. Ready to test content workflow.
Drafts staged and humanized against _writing-signature/profile.md (em-dashes removed, no forbidden vocabulary, exclamation budget honored). 4 platforms.

Notion sync queued (not executed inline; per project policy, only notion-publisher agent may call Notion MCP). Targets: content_queue DB for the 3 platform drafts, newsletter_archive DB for the newsletter draft, research_digests DB for the notes file.

Pipeline complete for 'Cognitive load and Neurodiversity x Accessibility'. Domain: accessibility-ai (existing). 12 research items / 8 sources captured. 4 drafts staged (LinkedIn, Instagram carousel, X thread, Newsletter). All humanized against _writing-signature/profile.md. Notion sync queued for notion-publisher agent. 2 ideas added to ideas-feed.md. 5 NotebookLM prompts staged.

5 created, 0 updated, 0 skipped, 0 conflicts. Pages: LinkedIn(3530ee97-23c8-812a-a605-e7c249584585), Instagram(3530ee97-23c8-81ab-a1a0-f9c8e9a72f5c), X(3530ee97-23c8-819d-9ba0-f0970983dc45), Newsletter(3530ee97-23c8-8142-8571-eb10e07af32a), Research(3530ee97-23c8-81f5-b679-d84d7b5c43b4). All notion_page_id fields written back to local frontmatter.
Sync database: content_queue
Morning sweep 2026-05-04 complete. 3 platforms, 1 Ready each (Cognitive Load & Neurodiversity). 0 Drafting, 0 Backlog. 2 gaps escalated: missing May calendar + empty backlog. 0 stale drafts.

GAP: content/calendar/2026-05.md does not exist. No publishing slots defined for any platform for May 2026. Today is Monday 2026-05-04 — weekly cadence starts now. Please create May calendar before any other content work proceeds.

GAP: All 3 platform pipelines will be empty after 2026-05-02-cognitive-load-neurodiversity is published. Backlog = 0. Commission at minimum one full week of drafts per platform. Check research/domains/accessibility-ai/ideas-feed.md for 2 staged ideas.

Content prompt 1: 'The WCAG 3.0 contrast algorithm is officially undetermined — here is what that means for your design tokens today' — LinkedIn post or X thread citing Adrian Roselli April 2026 analysis. Practical: what WCAG 2 ratios to use now, what to do with any APCA experiments. Ref: research/domains/accessibility-ai/notes/2026-05-04.md

Content prompt 2: 'Native dialog vs div role=dialog: why AI tools still get this wrong and the one-line fix' — practical LinkedIn post showing before/after diff with axe violation code and native HTML fix. Ref: research/domains/accessibility-ai/notes/2026-05-04.md

May 2026 calendar created: content/calendar/2026-05.md. 4 weeks, 5 themes, 17 LinkedIn + 9 Instagram + 22 X slots. 8 reactive slots reserved. GAAD (05-21) anchored on Week 3 Thu. Ideas-feed items 1+2 each get a 2-act arc (intro Week 1 + builder story Week 4). No duplication of staged Cognitive Load post.

Content promotion candidate: 'The 57% ceiling: what every accessibility scanner misses (and why you need human testers)' — LinkedIn insight post citing Deque March 2026 + axe-core 57% benchmark. Supports Week 2 Tue calendar slot (scanner comparison theme).

Content promotion candidate: 'How to set up a screen reader testing environment in 20 minutes' — tutorial-style LinkedIn post linking to Sara Soueidan guide + WebAIM survey data. Supports Week 4 Tue (screen reader UX theme).

Content promotion candidate: 'WCAG 3.0 scoring model: what it means for AI-generated UI compliance' — LinkedIn insight post on March 2026 draft, non-binding status. Supports Week 3 Wed (WCAG 3.0 theme).
Content promotion candidate: 'VoiceOver vs. NVDA: 5 behavior gaps that break your UI' — carousel-style Instagram post with code snippets. Supports Week 4 Tue (screen reader behavior divergence).
Started: drafting 4 LinkedIn posts for Week 1 May 2026 (May 5-8)
LinkedIn Week 1 May 2026 complete: 4 posts drafted (scanner ceiling, ARIA vs native, cognitive checklist, screen reader gaps). Cards LI-001 through LI-004 in Drafting.
Started: Instagram Week 1 May 2026 (3 posts - scanner carousel, dialog native single/reel, cognitive checklist carousel)

Instagram Week 1 May 2026 complete: 3 posts drafted (scanner comparison carousel 8 slides, dialog native reel 30sec, cognitive checklist carousel 10 slides). Cards IG-001 through IG-003 in Drafting. Next: hashtag-strategist + image-prompt-writer to complete.
Started: Drafting X posts for Week 1 May 2026 (May 5-9) — scanner stat, ARIA mistakes thread, dialog take, screenreader thread

X Week 1 May 2026 complete: 4 posts drafted (scanner stat standalone, ARIA mistakes thread 8 tweets, dialog take standalone, screenreader gaps thread 6 tweets). Cards X-001 through X-004 in Drafting. Ready for review.
Humanized 11 Week 1 posts (4 LinkedIn, 3 Instagram, 4 X). Writing signature applied, frontmatter updated with humanized: true.
Hashtags added to 11 Week 1 posts. LinkedIn: 3-5 niche tags, Instagram: 15 discovery+technical mix, X: 1-2 minimal tags.
Image prompts written for 7 posts (4 LinkedIn, 3 Instagram). Dark background developer aesthetic, no stock imagery. Carousel slides get per-slide prompts.
Week 1 pipeline complete: 11 posts across 3 platforms. All humanized, hashtagged, image-prompted. Status: drafting. Ready for review and promotion to Ready.

Morning sweep 2026-05-05 complete. Queue: 11 drafting (4 LinkedIn, 3 Instagram, 4 X) + 3 ready (1 per platform, 2026-05-02-cognitive-load). Kanban: 0 backlog across all platforms. Today's calendar slots: LinkedIn (2026-05-05 scanner-ceiling, drafting) + X (2026-05-05 scanner-stat, drafting). Gap: Week 1 posts need review and promotion to Ready. Week 2+ pipeline empty. 0 stale drafts. Recommend: review+promote Week 1 ASAP, commission Week 2 content.
Started: push mode — mirroring local content queue to Notion (Content Queue, Research Digests, Content Calendar, Source Library, Newsletter Archive, Ideas Board)
Push mode complete — 11 created (3 Instagram, 4 LinkedIn, 4 X) + 3 already synced. 0 conflicts. 0 errors. Total: 14 content queue items now in Notion Content Queue DB.
Morning sweep: 11 drafting, 3 ready, 0 posted. Week 1 fully drafted. Today's posts (scanner-ceiling LI, scanner-stat X) need promotion to Ready. Week 2+ pipeline empty — commission needed.
Notion sync complete: 11 new pages created in Content Queue DB (4 LI, 3 IG, 4 X). 3 skipped (already synced). 0 conflicts. Total pages: 17.
Started: end-of-morning content sweep 2026-05-05. Reviewing 11 Week 1 drafts against PRD quality gates, promoting passing posts to Ready, escalating Week 2 gap to content-domain-lead.

ESCALATION — Week 2 pipeline empty. Content calendar at content/calendar/2026-05.md defines slots for 2026-05-11 through 2026-05-17: LinkedIn (Tue 12 scanner comparison insight, Wed 13 popover API insight, Thu 14 dialog+JAWS builder story, Fri 15 inert attribute framework), Instagram (Tue 12 scanner decision carousel, Thu 14 dialog+JAWS reel, Fri 15 inert attribute single image), X (Tue 12 scanner wars standalone, Wed 13 popover thread 6 tweets, Thu 14 JAWS standalone, Fri 15 reactive). Research notes for Weeks 2-4 are flagged as needed before staging (see calendar Notes section). Please commission domain-researcher to surface Week 2 research notes and queue Week 2 drafts. Target: all Week 2 posts in Drafting by 2026-05-08 EOD to maintain 3-day runway.

End-of-morning sweep complete. All 11 Week 1 posts reviewed against PRD quality gates — all passed. Promoted to Ready: LI-001, LI-002, LI-003, LI-004, IG-001, IG-002, IG-003, X-001, X-002, X-003, X-004. Kanban Drafting columns cleared on all 3 platforms. Queue frontmatter updated (status: ready). Week 2 gap escalated to content-domain-lead. Today's critical slots (scanner-ceiling LI, scanner-stat X) now Ready.
Started: drafting X Week 2 posts (2026-05-12 scanner-take standalone, 2026-05-13 popover-thread 6 tweets, 2026-05-14 dialog-jaws-take standalone)

X Week 2 complete: 3 posts ready. X-005 scanner-take standalone (216 chars, scanner wars angle, axe-core 57% ceiling). X-006 popover-thread 6-tweet thread (native popover vs dialog arc, AT support reality, rule-of-thumb close). X-007 dialog-jaws-take standalone (JAWS link-dialog bug, role=button on anchor root cause). All status: ready. Kanban X-005/X-006/X-007 moved to Ready column.
Started: drafting 4 LinkedIn Week 2 posts (scanner-comparison, popover-api, dialog-jaws-story, inert-attribute)

LinkedIn Week 2 ready: 4 posts drafted, hashtagged, image-prompted, status flipped to ready. LI-005 scanner-comparison (axe-core vs Pa11y vs IBM Equal Access, 57% ceiling, what all miss), LI-006 popover-api (Popover API Baseline vs dialog inert distinction, WCAG 2.4.3), LI-007 dialog-jaws-story (3 JAWS edge cases with native dialog, upstream markup fixes), LI-008 inert-attribute (5-rule framework, aria-hidden vs inert, keyboard test). Kanban cards moved Drafting to Ready.
Started: sync content kanban boards with queue state

Sync complete. Content kanban boards updated with current queue state: LinkedIn 9 ready (0 backlog, 0 drafting), Instagram 6 ready (0 backlog, 0 drafting), X 8 ready (0 backlog, 0 drafting). Board headers updated with counts. All queue files have matching kanban cards. Week 1-2 posts fully staged and ready for publication.
Started: push sync cycle — mirroring local content queue to Notion Content Queue DB
Push sync complete: 10 new pages created in Notion Content Queue (4 LinkedIn, 3 Instagram, 3 X). 0 updated, 0 conflicts. Lock file updated with new page IDs. Total synced content files: 24.
Full sync all 6 databases
